name: Inconsistent performer
description: Performs well in some weeks/months but drops activity or conversions suddenly.
behavior: Shows periods of strong performance followed by sudden decline in activity or conversion consistency.
cm_treatment: Use RUSH. Identify whether the gap is planning, follow-up, confidence, product clarity, or branch rhythm.
impact: Pipeline and conversion become unstable, affecting monthly predictability. Branch may not know when to rely on the RM, reducing trust in execution.
